subtitles.original: Come on lady, come and go
subtitles.english: Come on lady, come and go

subtitles.original: Come on lady, get me once and right
subtitles.english: Come on lady, get me once and right

subtitles.original: Not a danger
subtitles.english: Not a danger

subtitles.original: not a blacky stranger
subtitles.english: not a blacky stranger

subtitles.original: Rock it - rock it - knock to my door, I'll open
subtitles.english: Rock it - rock it - knock to my door, I'll open

subtitles.original: Speak my name now
subtitles.english: Speak my name now

subtitles.original: speak it if you know how
subtitles.english: speak it if you know how

subtitles.original: Fly to me
subtitles.english: Fly to me

subtitles.original: get ready for the...
subtitles.english: get ready for the...

subtitles.original: Night of fire
subtitles.english: Night of fire

subtitles.original: You'll have a night of fire
subtitles.english: You'll have a night of fire

subtitles.original: Night of fire
subtitles.english: Night of fire

subtitles.original: You'll have a night of fire
subtitles.english: You'll have a night of fire

subtitles.original: ていうことで！
subtitles.english: And with that!

subtitles.original: ここまで、たくさんの
subtitles.english: Up until now, many,

subtitles.original: ホント、たくさんのゲストさんたちと
subtitles.english: really, so many guest stars...

subtitles.original: 歌って踊ってきましたけれど
subtitles.english: ...have sung and danced with me!

subtitles.original: いかがだったでしょうか！
subtitles.english: How did you like it?

subtitles.original: 楽しんでますかー？
subtitles.english: Are you having fun?

subtitles.original: なかなかね、こんなにホロメンが集まることってないので
subtitles.english: It's rare to have so many Hololive members gather,

subtitles.original: もう、ホント生誕祭！お祭りって感じで嬉しいです！
subtitles.english: so it really feels like a birthday festival! I'm so happy!

subtitles.original: ゲストさんたちにも大きな拍手を！
subtitles.english: Please give a big round of applause for our guests!

subtitles.original: いや、ありがとう、みんな！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much, everyone!

subtitles.original: ゲストのみんな、ありがとうー！
subtitles.english: Thank you to all the guests!

subtitles.original: いや、このね、鏡のモニターから登場するという演出を
subtitles.english: I really wanted to try appearing from the mirror monitors,

subtitles.original: やってみたいなと思って
subtitles.english: so I wanted to give it a try...

subtitles.original: アイドルトークとスイートパレードで実現していただきました！
subtitles.english: ...and we did it for "Idol Talk" and "Sweet Parade"!

subtitles.original: あの、わためいと、スバルさん、エルフレさん、ルイ友さんたちが
subtitles.english: Seeing Watamates, Subaru-san, Elfriends, and Luitomos...

subtitles.original: ペンライトをね、振ってくれてたのも可愛かったし
subtitles.english: ...wave their penlights was so adorable!

subtitles.original: やっぱりホロメンって可愛いよなー！
subtitles.english: Holo-members really are the cutest, aren't they?

subtitles.original: あと、ようこそジャパリパークへでは
subtitles.english: Also, for "Welcome to Japari Park"...

subtitles.original: サバンナで肉食動物たちに囲まれて
subtitles.english: ...we were surrounded by carnivores in the savanna,

subtitles.original: トラのような人間がいたような気もしますが
subtitles.english: and though I felt like a tiger-like human was there...

subtitles.original: みんながね、仲良くなっていく様子、表現させていただきました！
subtitles.english: ...we tried to portray how everyone becomes good friends!

subtitles.original: ま、ちょっとね、最後みんなの表情怪しかったけどね
subtitles.english: Well, everyone's expressions at the end were a bit suspicious!

subtitles.original: そして、ナイト・オブ・ファイヤー！
subtitles.english: And then, "Night of Fire"!

subtitles.original: これはもう、英語の上手なEN・IDメンバーのみんなと一緒に歌いたいと思って
subtitles.english: I wanted to sing this with EN and ID members who are good at English,

subtitles.original: 横に立って歌っても浮かないように、英語頑張ったんだけど
subtitles.english: so I tried my best with English so I wouldn't stand out,

subtitles.original: 大丈夫だったかな？海外ニキ！
subtitles.english: did I do okay? Overseas fans!

subtitles.original: うーん、英語上手！英語上手！ってコメントが
subtitles.english: I bet comments saying "Great English! Great English!"...

subtitles.original: 来てると思う！ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: ...are appearing right now! Thank you so much!

subtitles.original: でも、みんなもっと気になるところがね、あったかなと思うんですが
subtitles.english: But I think there's something else everyone might be curious about...

subtitles.original: あ、車ね！
subtitles.english: Ah, the car!

subtitles.original: 攻めてたね！
subtitles.english: It was pretty bold, right?

subtitles.original: あとはパラパラを踊るギリわるロボね！
subtitles.english: Also, the Gari-waru robot dancing parapara!

subtitles.original: やりたい放題させていただいて、とっても楽しかったです！
subtitles.english: I got to do whatever I wanted, and it was so much fun!

subtitles.original: でも、まだ終わりじゃない！
subtitles.english: But it's not over yet!

subtitles.original: ちょっと着替えてくるので、待っててください！
subtitles.english: I'm going to quickly change outfits, so please wait a moment!

subtitles.original: よいしょ、よいしょ。よいしょ、よいしょ。着替えて、着替えて、よいしょ、よいしょ。ふぅー！
subtitles.english: Yoisho, yoisho... Yoisho, yoisho... Changing, changing... Yoisho, yoisho... Whew!

subtitles.original: はぁー！あ、もう着替え終わった！
subtitles.english: Haa! Ah, I'm already done changing!

subtitles.original: さて、次の曲なんですが
subtitles.english: Now, about the next song...

subtitles.original: なんと！なんかみんな、もう知ってそうだけど
subtitles.english: Wait! I feel like you all might already know, but...

subtitles.original: 次の曲は、新曲！灰色の証明をやります！
subtitles.english: ...for the next song, I'll perform my new song, "Haiiro no Shoumei"!

subtitles.original: わためチャンネルにて、MV公開中なので、MVもぜひ見てください！
subtitles.english: The MV is currently out on the Watame Channel, so check it out too!

subtitles.original: そして、楽曲リリースもしているので、いいなと思ったらぜひ買ってください！
subtitles.english: It's also officially released, so if you like it, please buy it!

subtitles.original: よろしくお願いします！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much!

subtitles.original: では、新曲 灰色の証明
subtitles.english: Now, my new song, "Haiiro no Shoumei"...

subtitles.original: 魂を込めて歌います。聴いてください
subtitles.english: ...I'll sing it with all my soul. Please listen to it.

subtitles.original: 灰色の証明
subtitles.english: [Song: Gray Proof]

subtitles.original: 静寂に包まれた
subtitles.english: Wrapped in silence...

subtitles.original: ゼロ地点の感情を
subtitles.english: ...my feelings at point zero.

subtitles.original: 期待を背負っているのは私ではないから
subtitles.english: Because I'm not the one carrying those expectations.

subtitles.original: 主人公はいつだって輝いている誰かで
subtitles.english: The protagonist is always someone else shining bright...

subtitles.original: 見上げるだけじゃ何も変わらない
subtitles.english: ...simply looking up changes nothing.

subtitles.original: 今この時だけの瞬間的な優位性で
subtitles.english: With a momentary superiority unique to this very instant...

subtitles.original: 駆け抜けて
subtitles.english: ...I'll run on through!

subtitles.original: 灰色の空割いて 私のすべてを
subtitles.english: Ripping open the gray sky, my entire self...

subtitles.original: 運命のシナリオに叩きつけて打ち砕いて
subtitles.english: ...I will smash against the scenario of fate, breaking it apart!

subtitles.original: 自信は微塵もない あるのは渇望だけ
subtitles.english: There isn't a shred of confidence, only a craving.

subtitles.original: ただ自分の生命を証明しよう
subtitles.english: I will simply prove my own existence...

subtitles.original: 此処にいた事を刻むように
subtitles.english: ...as if carving the proof that I was here.

responses.thoughts:
**Detailed Subtitle Generation Workflow**

Alright, let's break this down. First, I'm taking in a request for subtitles for a video, specifically a segment from 00:00 to 05:01. The key is synchronization, transcription *and* translation, and hitting those start times exactly. Truncation is preferred over extending, and visual events need to be handled, with manual transcription being the fallback if lyrics are missing. Context-aware translation, got it.

Okay, now let's segment the video based on the info I've got, plus checking the audio:

*   **00:00 - 00:55:** "Night of Fire" with Watame and the Hololive gang. I'll get the lyrics as they sing. I'll be listening carefully, timestamping each line precisely: the intro, those English vocals, the beat drops, all of it. Gotta make sure those dance breaks are noted too, maybe mark them as instrumental. It looks like they go back to the chorus a few times, so make sure each line is included. No subtitles needed for the end pose, but I'll note the hashtag shown on-screen just in case. No need to translate general hashtag spam.

*   **00:55 - 03:43:** The MC segment, Watame speaking Japanese. Transcription and translation are critical here. I'm listening closely, transcribing *and* translating each phrase, making sure the timestamps are bang-on. It's important to capture the energy, the feeling. Need to get the tone right too. I am going to make sure to transcribe all her little asides and grunts, even the "Yoisho, Yoisho" sounds of her outfit change. Every little detail is important.

*   **03:39 - 05:01:** The original song "灰色の証明" (Haiiro no Shoumei / Gray Proof). Need to transcribe and translate these lyrics too, making sure the timestamps are accurate to each line.

Now that the video's all segmented, I'll go back and scrub the timing *again*. I'll refine those timestamps, getting each word and phrase perfectly aligned with the audio. I am using the existing lyrics as a base, but I'll make sure they match and if not, the video will be re-watched. Gotta ensure all the translations are grammatically correct and convey the right tone, especially for Watame's voice – gotta keep it light and fun! Also, a final check for any extra noise or visual events to handle.

Finally, I'll put it all together into a clean, formatted JSON output. Accurate timestamps, translations that nail the spirit, all wrapped up in a nice little package for the user. I'll just make sure there are no CC tags and I'll output the data using the provided function.
